title: DriftStatus
description: Aggregate drift status for all Kin companions in Mission Control dashboard. Support-safe summary.

record_id.description: Unique identifier for this status record

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when status was computed

kin_drift_scores.description: Drift scores for each Kin companion

drift_score.description: Current drift score (0 = no drift, 1 = maximum drift)

status.description: Drift status based on score and threshold

last_alert_severity.description: Severity of most recent alert, if any

last_alert_at.description: Timestamp of most recent alert, if any

alert_count_24h.description: Total drift alerts in the last 24 hours

critical_count_24h.description: Critical severity alerts in the last 24 hours

high_count_24h.description: High severity alerts in the last 24 hours

medium_count_24h.description: Medium severity alerts in the last 24 hours

low_count_24h.description: Low severity alerts in the last 24 hours

overall_health.description: Overall drift health status across all Kin

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when record was created

stable_kin_count.description: Number of Kin with healthy drift status

warning_kin_count.description: Number of Kin with warning drift status

alert_kin_count.description: Number of Kin with alert drift status

critical_kin_count.description: Number of Kin with critical drift status

total_kin_count.description: Total number of Kin companions tracked
